description: Assemble npm package from transpiled sources, bin, license, dist files and meta.

transpiledDir.description: Directory containing transpiled ESM+CJS sources (relative to project root).

jsSrcDir.description: Directory containing js source JSON files (relative to project root).

licenseSrcDir.description: Directory containing license files to copy (relative to project root).

npmBinDir.description: Directory containing npm bin scripts (relative to project root).

webpackConfig.description: Path to the webpack config file to copy into bin/ (relative to project root).

artifactsDir.description: Artifacts directory containing js, css, ts sub-dirs for dist copy (relative to project root).

outputDir.description: Output directory for the assembled npm package (relative to project root).

licenseTemplateFile.description: Path to the license header template file (relative to project root).

eulaUrl.description: EULA URL embedded in the license header.
